feedback.text: Hello, I hope you are having a Great day. I belive another point should be added to protect applications in general such as Videogames, Photo/Video editing software etc. from simply being disabled by companies even after being purchaesed, an good example of what exactly i mean would be what the Stop destroying games iniciative is currently trying to achive for games but not only for games. i belive this is a growing issue in the digital world where digital products are being taken away even after being payed for. I hope you have a great day, bye bye
